title: Food Chain Fiasco
short_description: Build food chains in the right order — mess up and the grass starts chasing the lion.
description: Put each ecosystem's food chain in the right order, producer first and top predator last. Get it wrong and the ecosystem hilariously acts out your mistake — the grass chases the lion, the mouse declares itself king of the owls. Grade bands ramp from 3-link to 5-link chains across meadows, oceans and forests. Teaches food chains, producers/consumers and energy flow, with first-try and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the organisms in order, starting with the plant.
